ConnectionStrings.ApplicationConnectionString: Do not expose connection strings in the repository.

JwtKeyVaultOptions.VaultUrl: These values are meant to be set on environment variables level.
JwtKeyVaultOptions.KeyName: Azure Key Vault is used to generate JWTs only in non-development environments.
JwtKeyVaultOptions.TenantId: For development purposes use regular secret-based JWT generation.
JwtKeyVaultOptions.ClientId: Do not expose these property values in the repository.

Credentials.Password: You are required to provide your mailbox credentials in order to use the application.
Credentials.UserName:
It is recommended to set them through the environment variables,
      //             e.g.: key - 'SmtpOptions__Credentials__UserName', value - 'my@email.com'
